codeReview.summary: The overview gains reactive progress cards and active-run tiles, but the feature stops short of the promised control surface. The live monitor never exposes a cancellation action, so researchers cannot stop an in-flight study from the UI.

issues.description: The live-monitor card only renders read-only metrics plus an “Open runs tab” link (`apps/web/src/routes/study-pages.tsx:910`). The feature never imports or calls `api.studies.cancelStudy`, so there is no cancellation button or confirmation flow anywhere on the monitoring surface despite the feature description promising cancellation actions. That blocks the required mid-execution cancel flow from the user-visible UI.

summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit `185faae95a0cda1e9e3add26f674adbd7e2c8105` for `live-monitoring-frontend`. Result: fail — the monitoring UI is read-only and never exposes the cancellation action promised by the feature.
